summary: Tested bulk-rename categories feature (backend endpoint + frontend dialog) and re-ran Lunchpad nested-import regression. All backend pytest tests pass (5 new + 5 regression = 10/10). Full UI flow verified: button -> dialog -> edit input -> save -> persistence -> revert. Find/Replace + Reset also verified.

issues: Dialog backdrop/overlay looks semi-transparent — page content behind the dialog is clearly visible, which slightly reduces visual focus. Functionality is unaffected. Consider increasing backdrop opacity or adding a subtle blur.

critical_code_review_comments: bulk_rename_categories accepts List[dict] (raw) instead of a Pydantic model — consider defining a BulkRenameItem(BaseModel) with id:str + name:str for stricter validation and OpenAPI schema clarity.
Endpoint silently treats unknown ids as 'skipped' (returns only counts). Frontend cannot tell which ids failed. Consider returning skipped_ids list for better UX.
Background translation tasks are spawned in a loop without throttling — on a bulk rename of 50+ categories this fires 50 concurrent translation requests. Consider batching or queueing.
test_credentials: admin / 220066 (Superadmin) — used existing «Мята Спортивная» restaurant, no seed data needed
seed_data_creation: Temp categories created during pytest with TEST_ prefix; cleaned up via fixture teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk rename endpoint POST /api/restaurants/{rid}/categories/bulk-rename works correctly. Lunchpad 3-level nested import parser is covered by /app/backend/tests/test_lunchpad_nested_import.py (5/5 passing). For UI: dialog testid='bulk-rename-dialog', input testid pattern 'bulk-rename-input-{cat_id}', save 'bulk-rename-save-btn', find 'bulk-rename-find-input', replace 'bulk-rename-replace-input', apply 'bulk-rename-apply-btn', reset 'bulk-rename-reset-btn', counter 'bulk-rename-counter'. Restaurant «Мята Спортивная» (rid=aa25189d-d668-4838-915a-c5d936547f3f) has 50 real categories — good for stress tests.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Feature implementation is correct and complete. Endpoint validates auth, trims names, skips invalid/empty/unknown items, resets name_en/name_zh on update, and dispatches translation as background tasks. Frontend dialog correctly tracks edited rows, supports find/replace and per-row reset, displays counter, and refreshes parent list after save.
